headline: UDR (NYSE:UDR) Earnings Beat Sends Shares Higher, But Guidance Remains Muted
summary: UDR Inc. crushed Q1 2026 earnings estimates with a 440% FFOA beat, boosted by asset sales and buybacks. The REIT also announced a historic shift to monthly dividends, though core operations show muted growth.
